\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4858 introduces Holonomy Theta Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\hat{\\Theta}_T = \\exp\\left( i \\oint_{\\mathcal{C}} \\nabla \\phi \\cdot d\\ell \\right) \\cdot \\sum_{n \\in \\mathbb{Z}} \\delta(t - n \\tau_{\\text{ref}}) \\equiv \\hat{\\Theta}_{\\text{cl}} \\cdot \\sqrt{\\chi_T}$$
